content.full_text:
June 5, 1992

Carla Wardlow
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street
Sacramento, California 95814

Dear Ms. Wardlow:

This letter is to confirm our phone conversation regarding the California Channel reception to be held on June 15, 1992.

As I explained to you, the California Channel along with four sponsors are each contributing money for this reception announcing its presence in Sacramento. Unfortunately when the invitations were printed the persons representing those sponsors were also on the invite, two of which are lobbyists. However, all replies are going to the public relations firm hired to put on the event, and none of those people or the sponsors on the invite are arranging any part of this event.

Your reply to me was that because they were not arranging any part of this reception there would not be a $10.00 limit per person attending.

Thank you for assistance.

Sincerely,

Margaret A. McArthur
